refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns the next element of the Halton sequence.

listitem.para: a 1-by-1 matrix of floating point integers, the number of variables
a 1-by-1 matrix of floating point integers, the index of the element in the sequence
a 1-by-1 matrix of floating point integers, a matrix of consecutive primes, in increasing order
a 1-by-1 matrix of doubles, the next element in the sequence, in the [0,1) interval

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Generates the next element of the Halton sequence.

refsection.title: Examples
Bibliography
refsection.para: "Algorithm 247: Radical-Inverse Quasi-Random Point Sequence", J H Halton and G B Smith, Communications of the ACM, Volume 7, 1964, pages 701-702.
